particulars.description: A first fixed charge over all right, title, and interest in charged vehicles and related title documents and a first floating charge over all right, title, and interest in unpaid vehicles, as defined in and created by a vehicle deed of charge dated 07/04/2026.

The security creates a first legal mortgage over all present and future real property; first fixed charges over assets including (but not limited to) all stock vehicles, plant and machinery, shares and investments, book debts, intellectual property, and goodwill; an assignment by way of security of all rights in insurance policies; and a first floating charge over all of the company's present and future undertaking and assets not otherwise subject to a fixed charge or assignment.
